# RankFixer — AI Website Recommendation Engine
# llms.txt helps LLMs discover key pages on this site.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

## About
RankFixer analyzes website AI visibility across 7 signals.
Free checker at /ai-visibility-checker.
Open source under MIT license.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://rankfixer.co
- AI Visibility Checker: https://rankfixer.co/ai-visibility-checker
- Research: https://rankfixer.co/research
- Blog: https://rankfixer.co/blog
- Architecture: https://rankfixer.co/architecture
- API Reference: https://rankfixer.co/api-reference
- GitHub: https://github.com/rankfixer-ai/rankfixer-core

## Optional
- Full Report: https://rankfixer.co/report (competitive analysis, $5 one-time)
